input: Validate the structure of my local plugin at ./my-plugin
expected_behavior: Checks for .claude-plugin/plugin.json, commands/, agents/, skills/, hooks/hooks.json, and CLAUDE.md. Reports counts of each artifact type and flags any missing required files.

input: Check my plugin for common issues before deploying
expected_behavior: Scans for orphaned files, missing prefixes, stale versions, invalid hook matchers, and broken file references in CLAUDE.md. Reports each issue with suggested fix.

input: Deploy and reload my plugin changes
expected_behavior: Verifies plugin is in active location, checks discoverability, and instructs user to run /reload-plugins. If hooks changed, advises running /hooks. If LSP changed, advises full restart.

input: My plugin is missing some directories, fix it
expected_behavior: Detects missing required directories (commands/, agents/, skills/, hooks/, scripts/) and creates them with mkdir -p. Reports what was created.

input: Give me a full reload report for the sofka-discovery-framework plugin
expected_behavior: Produces formatted reload report showing plugin name, version, location, counts for commands/agents/skills/hooks, and final status (READY or issues found).
